de.uka.ilkd.key.settings

Class GeneralSettings

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.settings.GeneralSettings
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Settings, Cloneable

    public class GeneralSettings
extends Object
implements Settings, Cloneable

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      private static String AUTO_SAVE 
      private int autoSave
      auto save is disabled by default.
      static boolean disableSpecs
      if true then JML specifications are globally disabled in this run of KeY, regardless of the regular settings
      private static String DND_DIRECTION_SENSITIVE_KEY 
      private boolean dndDirectionSensitive
      is drag and drop instantiation direction sensitive
      private LinkedList<SettingsListener> listenerList 
      private static String ONE_STEP_SIMPLIFICATION_KEY 
      private boolean oneStepSimplification
      is one-step simplification enabled
      private static String RIGHT_CLICK_MACROS_KEY 
      private boolean rightClickMacros
      launches the rightclick the macro menu.
      private static String TACLET_FILTER 
      private boolean tacletFilter
      minimize interaction is on by default
      private static String USE_JML_KEY 
      private boolean useJML
      JML is active by default

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void addSettingsListener(SettingsListener l)
      adds a listener to the settings object
      int autoSavePeriod() 
      protected void fireSettingsChanged()
      sends the message that the state of this setting has been changed to its registered listeners (not thread-safe)
      boolean isDndDirectionSensitive() 
      boolean isRightClickMacro() 
      boolean oneStepSimplification() 
      void readSettings(Object sender, Properties props)
      gets a Properties object and has to perform the necessary steps in order to change this object in a way that it represents the stored settings
      void removeSettingsListener(SettingsListener l)
      removes the listener from the settings object
      void setAutoSave(int period) 
      void setDnDDirectionSensitivity(boolean b)

      void setRightClickMacros(boolean b) 
      void setTacletFilter(boolean b) 
      void setUseJML(boolean b) 
      boolean tacletFilter() 
      boolean useJML()

      implements the method required by the Settings interface.

        Constant Field Values

      • disableSpecs

        public static boolean disableSpecs
        if true then JML specifications are globally disabled in this run of KeY, regardless of the regular settings

      • tacletFilter

        private boolean tacletFilter
        minimize interaction is on by default

      • dndDirectionSensitive

        private boolean dndDirectionSensitive
        is drag and drop instantiation direction sensitive

      • oneStepSimplification

        private boolean oneStepSimplification
        is one-step simplification enabled

      • rightClickMacros

        private boolean rightClickMacros
        launches the rightclick the macro menu. on by default.

      • useJML

        private boolean useJML
        JML is active by default

      • autoSave

        private int autoSave
        auto save is disabled by default. Positive values indicate save period.

      • listenerList

        private LinkedList<SettingsListener> listenerList

      • readSettings

        public void readSettings(Object sender,
                         Properties props)
        gets a Properties object and has to perform the necessary steps in order to change this object in a way that it represents the stored settings
        Specified by:
        readSettings in interface Settings

      • writeSettings

        public void writeSettings(Object sender,
                          Properties props)
        implements the method required by the Settings interface. The settings are written to the given Properties object. Only entries of the form = (,)* are allowed.
        Specified by:
        writeSettings in interface Settings
        Parameters:
        props - the Properties object where to write the settings as (key, value) pair

      • fireSettingsChanged

        protected void fireSettingsChanged()
        sends the message that the state of this setting has been changed to its registered listeners (not thread-safe)

      • addSettingsListener

        public void addSettingsListener(SettingsListener l)
        adds a listener to the settings object
        Specified by:
        addSettingsListener in interface Settings
        Parameters:
        l - the listener

      • removeSettingsListener

        public void removeSettingsListener(SettingsListener l)
        removes the listener from the settings object
        Parameters:
        l - the listener to remove
